CIVIL DOCKET FOR CASE #: 3:24-cv-08437-SI

Airwair International LTD. v. Zoetop Business Co., Limited d/b/a Shein. Assigned to Judge Susan Illston. Cause: Trademark Infringement. Date Filed: 11/25/2024.

Party Index

  • Plaintiff
  • Defendants
  • Counterclaims
Date Filed # Docket Text
11/25/2024 1 COMPLAINT for trademark infringement, false designation of origin, and related state-law claims filed by Airwair International LTD.
11/26/2024 6 Initial Case Management Scheduling Order with ADR deadlines. Case Management Statement due by 2/18/2025.
12/10/2024 16 Case reassigned to Judge Susan Illston. Judge William H. Orrick no longer assigned to the case.
06/02/2025 49 Pretrial Preparation Order entered. Mediation deadline set for 8/15/2025. Trial date set for 9/14/2026.
07/09/2025 73 Order granting stipulated protective order. Entered by Judge Susan Illston.

PACER Service Center Transaction Receipt

Billable Pages: 10
